docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CASTILLO, EFRAIN DBA OLYMPIC AUTO REPAIR AS TO DEFENDANT VALLARE, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, EFRAIN DBA OLYMPIC AUTO REPAIR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, EFRAIN DBA OLYMPIC AUTO REPAIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALLARE, JAMES $5,581.13 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,656.13, DEFENDANT MAY FILE A MOTION BEFORE THIS COURT SEEKING THAT THE JUDGMENT BE PAID IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS BASED ON HIS FINANCIAL HARDSHIP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY JAMES VALLARE IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $200.00 OR MORE ON OCTOBER 15, 2009 AND THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
